impact: This gives the public source discovery phase a fail-closed preflight layer before any live crawl: URLs are checked against HTTPS, the PP&D allowlist, private/consequential path fragments, optional content type expectations, and parsed robots directives using deterministic local inputs.
summary: Add deterministic PP&D robots.txt parsing and crawl-policy preflight helpers.
target_task: Task checkbox-4: Add robots and crawl-policy preflight helpers for PP&D public source discovery.
